description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of black, white, and wood-textured exterior surfaces. The structure is single-story, with large glass doors and windows on the front and side, allowing for ample natural light. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch area and a combination of vertical and horizontal lines in the landscaping. The right side of the house is dominated by a garage with a wood-textured door, while the rear and left sides have fewer windows and a more private appearance. The interior layout is open, with visible partition walls and a staircase, suggesting a split-level or sunken living area. The house sits on a landscaped plot with striped green and black ground patterns, enhancing its contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a mix of black, white, and wood-textured exterior surfaces. The design features a prominent entryway, attached garage, and open interior layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large glass doors, covered porch, and landscaped approach.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the garage with wood-textured door and fewer windows for privacy.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, multiple glass doors, and the open layout of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows and a more private, solid black wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, covered porch, and minimalistic modern styling with clean lines.
